---
name: Security report (public placeholder)
about: Report a suspected security issue without sharing sensitive exploit details publicly.
title: "[Security] "
labels: [security]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Provide a high-level description only. Do not include exploit payloads or sensitive secrets.

## Affected Area

- [ ] Policy gate / admission checks
- [ ] Attestation / identity verification
- [ ] Nonce replay protection
- [ ] SIEM / alerting
- [ ] Dashboard / frontend exposure
- [ ] Supply chain / CI workflow
- [ ] Other

## Severity (Estimated)

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

## Private Disclosure Request

State that you are requesting private coordination for full details.

## Contact Method

Provide a safe contact channel for private follow-up.
